description: An agent must perform a scheduled test of the Wireless Emergency Alert system for a specific region.

nodes.task_description: Verify the scheduled time and geographic area for the EAS test.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the test parameters from the schedule.

nodes.task_description: Broadcast the standardized test message to all cell towers in the designated area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully executes the broadcast command.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the system logs to confirm successful transmission from all towers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that all towers in the area successfully sent the test alert.
